title: CGPSC – Assistant Librarian – 7 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CGPSC Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Assistant Librarian. Candidates with B.Lib Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 24-04-2026, and closes on 23-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CGPSC official website psc.cg.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 21 years, Max: 40 years (for Chhattisgarh residents)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission सहायक ग्रंथपाल Recruitment 2026
